title: Galacticube
description: One block at a time, we reach the stars.
body:
Galacticube 2 is a space exploration mod that expands Minecraft by adding realistic planetary travel, starting with the Moon.
This mod introduces a new dimension, low gravity, vacuum survival mechanics, and the thrill of being the first to walk on an alien world — all built block by block.

It’s not just about going to space.
It’s about feeling like you’re there.

## 🌑 What’s in This Version
This is the first public alpha of Galacticube 2 — a minimal but functional foundation for future expansion.
Everything you need to reach the Moon is here, even if it’s still raw.

### ✅ Core Features:
Lunar Rocket — Craft a rocket using iron blocks, redstone, and an observer. Right-click to launch.

- Teleport to the Moon — Instant travel to a new dimension: galacticube:moon.

- Low Gravity — Jump higher, fall slower. Experience the bounce of lunar movement.
  
- Vacuum Survival — No air on the Moon. Without a helmet, you’ll suffocate.
  
- Glass Helmet — A placeholder for now: wearing glass as a helmet lets you breathe in space.
  
- Lunar Blocks — Mine lunar_stone and lunar_dust. The Moon is made of something new.
  
- Silent World — Black sky, no weather, no mobs. Just you, your breath, and the void.
  
- This is not a flight simulator — yet.
- But it is a proof of concept: you can build a rocket, use it, and stand on the Moon.

## 🔧 Why Download This Mod?
You should download Galacticube 2 if you:

- Love space, exploration, and sci-fi.
  
- Want to feel the isolation and wonder of walking on another world.
  
- Enjoy early-access mods and want to follow a project from its first steps.
  
- Are curious about dimension mods, gravity changes, or survival mechanics.
  
- Want to be part of a mod that will grow into a full solar system — with Mars, asteroids, and space stations.

This isn’t just decoration.
It’s the beginning of a journey.

**⚠️ What You Need to Know Before Downloading
Version: 0.1 (Alpha) — early development. Expect bugs, changes, and missing features.**

- No flight animation — teleportation only. The rocket doesn’t fly; it teleports you.
  
- No oxygen system yet — the glass helmet is a placeholder. It disables suffocation, but no tanks or mechanics.
- 
- No custom textures — all blocks use default Minecraft materials (e.g., grey stone, glass).
  
- No sound effects — silence is part of the atmosphere (real lunar ambience coming later).
  
- Fabric only — works on Minecraft 1.20.1 (Fabric). Not compatible with Forge, NeoForge, or other versions.
  
- Singleplayer & LAN only — multiplayer server support will come in later versions.
  
**This is not a finished product — it’s the first step.
But it works.**
